meta.title: SmartBudget — Real budget control, not passive tracking
meta.description: SmartBudget sets real-time spending limits by category and warns you before you overspend. Free to start.

hero.headline: Know you're overspending before you actually do.
hero.subhead: SmartBudget sets real limits on every category and warns you in real time — not at the end of the month, when it's too late to do anything about it.
hero.scrollHint: Watch a real budget limit in motion

demo.title: This is what "in control" actually looks like
demo.description: Set a limit per category. Spend against it. Watch the indicator update in real time — long before you hit 100%.

budgetProgress.title: Track your budgets
budgetProgress.description: Real-time progress for every category budget, updated as you spend.

categoryDistribution.title: See where it goes
categoryDistribution.description: A breakdown of monthly expenses by category, at a glance.

incomeExpense.title: Income vs expenses
incomeExpense.description: Compare monthly income and expenses to spot trends early.

financialRisk.title: Know your financial risk
financialRisk.description: A single indicator showing how exposed your budget is to fixed costs.
financialRisk.warningMessage: Heads up: your fixed expenses are getting close to the recommended limit.

glimpse.title: Your whole month, one screen
glimpse.description: Balance, income, expenses, and every budget's progress — the real SmartBudget dashboard.
glimpse.caption: Actual product screenshot, shown in dark mode.
glimpse.alt: SmartBudget dashboard showing current balance, monthly income and expenses, quick insights, and budget progress by category.

features.title: Built for people who want real control
features.description: No abandoned spreadsheets, no finance jargon.

limits.title: Limits that actually hold
limits.description: Set a monthly limit per category. SmartBudget tracks spending against it in real time and flags it before you cross the line.

reports.title: Reports you'll actually use
reports.description: Export a clean PDF or Excel report every month — for taxes, for a partner, or just for your own peace of mind.

language.title: Works in your language
language.description: Full English and Brazilian Portuguese support, not a half-translated afterthought.

premium.title: Free to start, honest about premium
premium.description: The core budgeting tools are free. Premium unlocks deeper reports and advanced insights when you're ready.

proof.title: Built in the open
proof.description: SmartBudget doesn't have a user base to show off yet — but you can check the code, the tests, and the security scans yourself.
proof.snykLabel: Snyk security scan: no known vulnerabilities

finalCta.title: Ready to actually see where your money goes?
finalCta.description: Create a free account in under a minute. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: Real budget control, not passive tracking.
